ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol representing the stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company associated with the stock */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sector the stock belongs to */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange the stock is listed on */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of initial public offering (IPO) */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Current market capitalization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "exchange_code" TEXT /* Code representing the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock this data pertains to */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on that date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on that date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on that date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on that date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Number of shares traded on that date */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price for the stock on that date */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Split ratio for the stock on that date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the trade */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares traded */,
  "trade_price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission for the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user owning the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "portfolio_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio-stock association */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares held in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was purchased */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the stock was purchased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user setting the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock for which the alert is set */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price above, price below) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the alert was created */,
  "triggered_at" TEXT /* Date the alert was triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock this data pertains to */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on that date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on that date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on that date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on that date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Number of shares traded on that date */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price for the stock on that date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the article is related to */,
  "article_title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "article_content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the article was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_articles_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyst_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock being rated */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst providing the rating */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating given by the analyst (e.g., buy, sell, hold) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_ratings_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyst_ratings_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Name of the analyst */,
  "firm" TEXT /* Firm the analyst works for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id")
)
